digest.component_or_area: unit test suite (rebar reconciler / fs_tools / overlap retrieve)
propositions: Existence tests using hasattr or constant-value assertions can pass while the underlying behavior is broken.
Exception importability tests must be replaced with tests that provoke each error via its failing path (DirectionMismatchError, UnknownActionError).
EXIT_RESCHEDULE must be asserted as the returned exit code from the reschedule path, not by comparing the constant to 75.
_FIELD_WEIGHTS must be validated by asserting a high-weight field outranks a low-weight one in ranking, not by exact constant values.
code_review Jira exclusion must be proven by running reconcile/compute_outbound_mutations and asserting zero outbound mutations, not by source grep.
fs_tools reuse must be proven by object identity (pai_tools._safe_path is fs_tools._safe_path), not by hasattr sweeps.
